title: FoxxBoyy's Military Blocks
description: This mod adds camo blocks, carbon fiber and steel, all survival friendly.
body:
# This is a military themed mod
It is essential for anybody who is looking for camo blocks and doesn't want any unneccessary things, it's light weight and it adds alot of new stuff.
This is everything added to the mod so far:
# 9 camo variants:
![Woodland Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb8fca76d1fb3f20c0c292d91f6a367b95ec63b2_0.webp)
![Leaf Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0377b665db3f20f06b65d76a6336f206d8f4cb74.png)![Desert Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f40652cca8d68b17d941115721b83ce16889a9b4_0.webp)![Red Sand Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bac9e4330098c7495ec94cea2fbf5f724ab5ab11_0.webp)![Wood Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99bdfcb71d37c588a9cd19f6f4647a6c8057dea3.png)![Winter Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcf69e6ea3df37f10467ce99cfdc11e684284f1f_0.webp)![Blank Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/060c1e749e7e916e95559bed19cdab3612ad270a_0.webp)![Forest Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/964d3abfc83170a17fd052b077919b1faf0c3522.png)
![Cherry Camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da5be69902cb80274a904e617556d81f866f80ec.png)
# And other materials
![Steel Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56b41348730e3b2575ee199fa31e6e6cc768daa5.png)
![Carbon Fiber Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d13e8b7b799e2ee5f3f658a491780bd577d56fe.png)
![Asphalt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9943f82ce60a62b80bffe875f45f5fb487f729cb.png)
